center.name: 但尼丁
center.summary: 但尼丁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Eastern rosella，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Eastern rosellas were well-distributed in Dunedin by the 1930s, and between 1940s and 1950s they had been sighted across Otago

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Eastern rosellas were well-distributed in Dunedin by the 1930s, and between 1940s and 1950s they had been sighted across Otago
